criteria.name: Functionality and Versatility
criteria.description: Ability to perform a wide range of tasks, including content creation, image generation, code completion, and data analysis.

criteria.name: User Ratings and Reviews
criteria.description: Average rating based on user feedback, reflecting user satisfaction and app performance.

criteria.name: Integration with Existing Platforms
criteria.description: Seamless integration with popular platforms and services like Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, and social media platforms.

criteria.name: AI Model Advancement
criteria.description: Access to frontier AI models that are more capable, make fewer mistakes, and provide more useful features.

criteria.name: Market Popularity
criteria.description: The popularity of the AI tool based on monthly website visits and user base.
